mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (id, username, password, role_id, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{password}, #{roleId}, #{status}, now(), now()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE username = #{username}, password = #{password}, role_id = #{roleId}, status = #{status}, update_time = now()
INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, role_id, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{roleId}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_user
username = #{username},
password = #{password},
nickname = #{nickname},
email = #{email},
role_id = #{roleId},
status = #{status},
max_storage_bytes = #{maxStorageBytes},
used_storage_bytes = #{usedStorageBytes},
update_time = now()
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, username, nickname, email, role_id, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_user WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_user (id, username, nickname, email, role_id, max_storage_bytes, used_storage_bytes, status, create_time, update_time) values
(#{user.id}, #{user.username}, #{user.nickname}, #{user.email}, #{user.roleId}, #{user.maxStorageBytes}, #{user.usedStorageBytes}, #{user.status}, now(), now())
on duplicate key update username = values(username), nickname = values(nickname), email = values(email), role_id = values(role_id), max_storage_bytes = values(max_storage_bytes), used_storage_bytes = values(used_storage_bytes), status = values(status), update_time = now()
